summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AIProDucate evaluation management system. Backend APIs working well (94.7% success rate), frontend UI functional with proper role-based navigation. Minor issue with exam attempt flow due to max attempts reached.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 400 'Evaluation is not active' initially, resolved after toggling evaluation status
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Ensure evaluation is active before starting attempts

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Failed to load exam' error when student has reached max attempts

integration_issues.issue: Student cannot start new exam after reaching max attempts (2/2 used)

passed_tests: List questions by eval via GET /api/questions/by-eval/{id}
Frontend login page renders with User ID and Password fields
Admin can see 5 sidebar nav items (Evaluation Management, Question Bank, Manual Correction, Leaders Board, Student Portal)
Student can see 2 sidebar nav items (Student Portal, Leaders Board)
Create Evaluation button and modal work
Student Portal shows available exams section
Role-based access control (students cannot create evaluations/questions)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix exam attempt flow to handle max attempts gracefully - show proper message instead of error. Consider adding attempt count display in student portal.
